Internal · platform & engineering

Deterministic Business Operating System

SourceA converts ideas into deployable, proof-backed systems. This page holds the technical spine — validators, loops, receipts, and runtime orchestration. Start with sourcea-boot eval · Buyers and revenue: Home · Offer · Investors.

Evidence over features · Receipts over roadmaps

Execution chain

Intent → deployable output

Intent→ Machines→ Validators→ Loops→ Receipts→ Deployable output

Deterministic execution plus proof creates the moat — verifiable outcomes where most AI tools deliver only hope.

Internal layers

Factory · Runtime · Proof

One public brand. Three organizing layers — not three customer-facing products.

Factory

MVPs, landing pages, funnels, portals, workflows, vertical systems — rapid creation.

Prompt Forge →

Runtime

Machines, agent loops, Chat Unify, validators, orchestration for founders, agencies, and teams.

Platform evaluation →

Proof

Reports, receipts, audit trails, validation artifacts — compounds into conversion intelligence.

Proof chain →
